hero.description: I blend design and code to craft fast, accessible, and scalable interfaces. I work with teams and clients to ship ideas to production with quality.

approachSection.title: How I work
approachSection.subtitle: Clear process, frequent delivery, outcome focus.

steps.title: Discover
steps.desc: Understand problem, users and goals. Define scope and success.

steps.title: Build
steps.desc: Short iterations with feedback. Clean code, tests and performance.

steps.title: Deliver
steps.desc: Deploy and measure. Documentation and smooth handoff.
